title: First Steps Pink Baby Blanket 75X100CM Heart Design
features: SOFT & COMFORTING: These super soft baby blankets are perfect for tucking in your toddler, swaddling your newborn or comforting your children. Available in an array of gorgeous and on trend designs.

SIZE: 75cm x 100cm - meaning this blanket is the perfect size for covering you baby whether they are at home, in a cot, crib, pram or even great for swaddling. The blanket could also be used to comfort your baby during breastfeeding.
0+ MONTHS: Perfect! This blanket is ideal from birth. Let your newborn grow with their comfort blanket - no matter their age, they are sure to love it.

SUPER SOFT MATERIAL: The superior quality of the baby blanket can be felt in the material. Made from super soft flannel, the blanket can provide extra warmth and comfort to your baby. The soft material is great for them to snuggle into whilst falling asleep and is sure to keep them cosy and comfortable.

A GREAT GIFT: As this blanket would be ideal as a gift for a birthday, Christmas, or even a gift to give at a baby shower, christening or similar. Care & Usage Instructions Provided, Wash Before First Use, 30 Degrees Washable.
